owner.description: engineer owns Worker config/source/migration files like package.json, tsconfig.json when TypeScript is used, wrangler.jsonc, wrangler.toml, src/**, workers/**, and migrations/**. designer owns static UI files like public/index.html, public/styles.css, public/app.js, and assets/**.

owned_surfaces.description: Concrete repo paths this task will change, for example package.json, wrangler.jsonc, wrangler.toml, src/index.js, workers/tally.js, public/settings.html, migrations/0001_schema.sql. Wildcards such as src/**/*.ts, src/storage/*.ts, public/**, or src/** are not allowed. Use ['unknown: <reason>'] only when genuinely unknown; conceptual labels are not allowed. In a bare Worker folder, root scaffold ownership must include package.json, .gitignore, and at least one concrete Worker source input such as src/index.js or workers/app.js before runtime/source/static asset/migration tasks; include tsconfig.json only for TypeScript Worker source.

open_decisions.description: Only genuine blockers. Each entry should use: Topic: ... | Why it matters: ... | Options considered: ... | Follow-up impact: ...
